message.oathboundrelics.branded_time.rea: The burden is sufficient. Your attunement now answers the higher threshold.
message.oathboundrelics.branded_time.not: The burden is not yet enough. Your attunement still falls short.
The weapon remains dormant. You have not yet endured enough Branded Progress.
message.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.loc: The blade rejects you. Your Branded Progress is still lacking.
It answers only to those who have endured nearly the full burden of the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.req: It answers only to those who have endured nearly the full burden of the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.requir: It answers only to those who have endured nearly the full burden of the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.brandkeepers_mer: It answers only to one who is Branded and has endured enough active burden beneath the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.a: Apex answers only to one who bears the Oath and has reached 99.5% Branded attunement.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.branded_time_che: It measures how much of your life the Oath has consumed.
Brands the bearer and awakens bound relics.
A covenant that clings to flesh, soul, and memory.
Binds permanently once equipped.
Allows the bearer to equip other Oathbound curios.
Seven curses await the Branded:
- Frailty: You take %s more incoming damage.
- Provocation: Neutral creatures within %s blocks turn hostile.
- Shattered Plate: Armor is %s less effective.
- Blood Toll: Your first successful attack every %s consumes %s HP.
- Living Ember: Fire clings to you for at least %s while burning.
- Soul Fracture: On respawn, part of your soul was left behind. Retrieve it.
- Wakeful Doom: Sleep offers no refuge to the Branded.
Six blessings reward those who endure:
- Fortune of Blood: +%s Looting.
- Earthen Favor: +%s Fortune.
- Soul Harvest: +%s Experience from kills.
- Arcane Attunement: Enchanting options gain +%s levels.
- Bloodlust: +%s Attack Speed.
- Last Rite: When below %s HP, gain %s absorption.
Only those who bear the Relic may awaken Oathbound artifacts.
%s [Disabled by config]
Persists through death.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.requires_oathbou: Requires the Oathbound Relic to awaken.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.dormant_without_: Dormant unless the bearer is Branded.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.forbidden_text: Its meaning writhes beyond your grasp.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ashen_nail.effec: While burning, your attacks deal 35% more damage.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gravebell_locket: On kill, gain Speed I for 8s and Regeneration I for 4s.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hunters_sigil.ef: Deal 25% more damage to enemies already targeting you.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.shroud_of_the_fo: When struck to 3 hearts or less, gain brief protection. 60s cooldown.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_eye.effec: See clearly in darkness and reveal nearby monsters.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_ash.ef: Burning enemies take 20% more damage and are easier to track.
On kill, restore hunger and a small amount of health.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.thornbound_carap: Reflect 20% of incoming damage to attackers.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.executioners_coi: Deal 30% more damage to enemies below 30% health.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.relic_of_the_las: Survive a lethal hit once every 5 minutes.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.torch_of_graveso: Deal 25% more damage to undead and gain Strength on undead kills.
While carried, it drags at the body and deepens hunger.
You deserve some rest, after those days of suffering.
Only the Branded may wield its power.
- If a hit does not kill, gain 1 Laziness stack for 1 minute
- Shift + Left Click: 10 block sweep for 75% damage, gain 3 Laziness stacks, weakens enemies for 10s
- Right Click: Throw a heavy cube for 75% damage and stun for 10s (30s cooldown)
tooltip.oathboundrelics.oathbound_reliqu: A vessel that insists there is always room for one more burden.
Passive: Wards the bearer with absorption and desperate renewal.
Intended: Grants +2 Charm slots while worn.
Drawback: Wearing too many oathbound relics stirs hunger.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.chain_of_the_pen: Pain remembers. The chain merely keeps count.
Passive: Damage taken is stored as Penance.
Your next melee strike consumes stored Penance for bonus damage.
Marked strikes briefly reveal their victim.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.eye_of_the_sleep: It never closes. It only waits for you to look back.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_hollow: Its smoke smells like old vows and empty sanctuaries.
Passive: Nearby monsters are slowed and weakened.
The bearer gains renewal while surrounded.
In heavy crowds, the censer hardens the wearer further.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nail_of_the_firs: It asks only one thing: finish what was started.
Passive: Repeated strikes build Martyr's Claim on one target.
At full stacks, the target becomes Judged.
Slaying the Judged grants haste and absorption.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ashen_nail.flavo: It drinks flame like an old vow finally spoken aloud.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ashen_nail.desc_: Passive: While burning, your attacks deal 35% more damage.
The Nail turns pain into heat and heat into force.
Its hunger grows brightest in fire.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gravebell_locket: Each toll sounds like a burial you survived.
Passive: On kill, gain Speed I for 8s and Regeneration I for 4s.
Fresh death stirs the bell into motion.
It refuses to let the victor stand still.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hunters_sigil.fl: It favors prey bold enough to bare its teeth.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hunters_sigil.de: Passive: Deal 25% more damage to enemies already targeting you.
The Sigil rewards those who meet violence head-on.
A marked hunter does not fear being seen.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.pilgrims_thorn.f: A cruel little spur for long roads and longer penance.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.pilgrims_thorn.d: Passive: Gain 10% increased movement speed while Branded.
The Thorn urges the bearer onward without mercy.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_ash.fl: Its cinders cling to the air like funeral incense.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.censer_of_ash.de: Passive: Burning enemies take 20% more damage.
Ash-smoke makes fleeing prey easier to follow.
The censer remembers where the fire last fed.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.executioners_coi: It lands the same way every time: on someone's ending.
Passive: Deal 30% more damage to enemies below 30% health.
The Coin favors wounded prey and certain kills.
Once judgment begins, it asks for follow-through.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_eye.flavo: An empty socket sees what living eyes were never meant to.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_eye.desc_: Passive: Blindness and Darkness struggle to cling to you.
It does not brighten the world. It strips away the lie.
A funerary stitch that tightens after every life cut short.
Passive: On kill, restore hunger and a small amount of health.
The Thread turns endings into sustenance.
Every corpse leaves something behind for it to gather.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.shroud_of_the_fo: It settles over the doomed like a second skin.
Passive: When struck to 3 hearts or less, gain brief protection.
The Shroud is never kinder than when death comes close.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.thornbound_carap: Its shell was made by something that survived too often.
Passive: Reflect 20% of incoming damage to attackers.
Striking the bearer means bleeding for it.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.torch_of_graveso: Its flame chants softly for the dead and loudly for the restless.
Passive: Deal 25% more damage to undead.
Undead kills grant a burst of Strength.
The song grows warmer near old bones.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.voidstep_band.fl: A ring for those who have already made peace with the drop.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.voidstep_band.de: The Band teaches the ground to forget you.
A failed step is still a step, if the void accepts it.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vulture_charm.fl: It circles every battlefield long before the first body falls.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vulture_charm.de: Passive: Gain 50% more experience from kills.
The Charm grows fat on endings.
It knows the worth of carrion better than gold.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.relic_of_the_las: It waits in silence for the one breath you were never meant to keep.
Passive: Survive a lethal hit once every 5 minutes.
The Relic refuses to surrender its bearer to death so easily.
What it preserves is not always left untouched.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gold_ring.flavor: A modest band with just enough stubbornness to matter.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gold_ring.desc_2: A simple ward against ordinary harm.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.gold_ring.desc_3: Plain, dependable, and harder than it looks.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.cyan_ring.flavor: Its pale glow settles over the skin like quiet frost.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.cyan_ring.desc_2: The ring hardens the bearer against cleaner, colder blows.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.cyan_ring.desc_3: A calmer strength, but stronger all the same.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_ring.flav: A dim star-field turns inside the metal when danger draws near.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_ring.desc: Passive: Adds +1 Ring slot while worn.
The Ring bends space just enough to make room for one more treasure.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_gem: A torn fragment of a Branded soul.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.fla: Pride once lifted the cursed. Now it waits to devour them.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.req: Only the Branded may wield its power.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.pas: - Above half health, gain +2 damage for every 2 HP above the midpoint
- If a hit does not kill, lose 1 HP
- Kills grant +0.1 Attack Speed for 3 minutes, stacking independently
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.hel: - Nearby allies, companions, and pets lose 50% Attack Speed and Attack Damage
tooltip.oathboundrelics.vanitys_edge.inv: - For every 2 Armor, lose 1 Attack Damage
- Between 50% and 30% health, lose 50% Damage and Attack Speed
- Below 30% health, you fall into Losing Pride or Bravery for 10 minutes
tooltip.oathboundrelics.oblivion_stone.f: A dead stone that remembers what the world was trying to forget.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.oblivion_stone.l: - A rare crafting stone used in higher relic works
- Found only in the rarest forbidden caches
- Also drops from the Warden, Wither, and Ender Dragon
message.oathboundrelics.covetfang.locked: The blade covets more suffering before it will answer you.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.flavor: It does not want power. It wants the power that belongs to someone else.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.requir: Only the Branded may wield its hunger.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.passiv: - Gains bonus damage against targets stronger, healthier, faster, or more blessed than you
- Right-click a target to Claim it as your Coveted Target
- Slaying a Coveted Target steals pieces of its strength
- Failed kills wound you, and striking those beneath you wounds you further
tooltip.oathboundrelics.covetfang.invent: - Each beneficial effect on you reduces your Attack Damage
- Below 30% health, you become swift only if something stronger is near
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite.flavor: A cold gem born where the world thins and the void stares back.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite.line_1: - A rare End-born gemstone used in higher relic works
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite.line_2: - Hums faintly with distant, unfriendly power
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_armor.f: The End kept this metal buried for a reason.
- Strips Blindness and Darkness from the wearer
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_chestpl: - Grants warding when health runs low
- Endures when lesser armor would fold
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_legging: - Swifter still in the End and while Branded
tooltip.oathboundrelics.aredrite_boots.l: - Negates fall damage in the End
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tablet_of_stilln: The stone remembers a vow of weight, hunger, and surrender.
- A ritual tablet tied to the Sin of Sloth
- Used to awaken the blank form of Lethargic Flail
- It is never crafted, only discovered
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tablet_of_exalta: Its script reads like praise, but every line cuts like judgment.
- A ritual tablet tied to the Sin of Pride
- Used to awaken the blank form of Vanity's Edge
- It is never crafted, only discovered
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tablet_of_coveti: The glyphs shift when watched too long, as if they want what is yours.
- A ritual tablet tied to the Sin of Envy
- Used to awaken the blank form of Covetfang
- It is never crafted, only discovered
tooltip.oathboundrelics.burdened_flail_i: A ritual weight shaped in honor of collapse, hunger, and surrender.
- A forged idol required to awaken Sloth's weapon
- Worthless in battle, sacred in rite
- It remembers the shape of burden
tooltip.oathboundrelics.mirrorsteel_idol: Polished like triumph, heavy like expectation.
- A forged idol required to awaken Pride's weapon
- It reflects only the bearer it deems worthy
tooltip.oathboundrelics.hollow_fang_idol: Its edges seem to lean toward things that are not theirs.
- A forged idol required to awaken Envy's weapon
- It hungers for what others possess
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_ashes.flavo: What remains when End-born power is burned past memory.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_ashes.line_: - Rare ash used in the highest Oathbound rites
- Can be gathered from slain Shulkers
tooltip.oathboundrelics.eye_of_the_sleep: Passive: Grants night vision and sharpens the bearer when danger draws near.
Oakskin: While grounded and not sprinting, gain Resistance I.
When moving near hostiles, the Eye quickens your step instead.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.d: - Slows the wearer, but shrugs off pricking and crushing chip damage
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.a: - Your next melee strike expends Impact in a crushing shockwave
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.dorma: - Grants fire immunity and burns melee attackers
- Harmful effects fade faster while worn
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.awake: - Taking and dealing damage builds Heat
- High Heat empowers you and scorches nearby enemies
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.dorma: - Grants water breathing, vision, and speed underwater
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.awake: - Underwater foes are slowed, weakened, and dragged downward
- Fire becomes more dangerous to the bearer
tooltip.oathboundrelics.skybrand_feather: Dormant:
- Negates fall damage and may deflect projectiles
- Wither and void are more dangerous to the wearer
Awakened by the Oath:
- Grants aerial control while airborne
- Hard landings release a gust that scatters nearby enemies
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.dorm: - Greatly resists magic and ignores ender pearl damage
- Water makes the wearer dangerously unstable
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.awak: - Some attacks are escaped by a reactive blink
- A successful blink empowers your next hit
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.dorma: - Grants airless survival and strips harmful effects
- Your attacks inflict withering decay and death may fail to claim you
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.awake: - In darkness, nearby enemies are afflicted with Hollow Dominion
- The relic is strongest where sight and hope both fail
tooltip.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.u: Upgrade by using the remnant while holding the required catalyst in your offhand.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.m: Dormant, Latent, and Awakened may be used by any mortal.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.o: Ascended and Transcendent answer only to a bearer of the Oathbound Relic.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.r: Requires the Oathbound Relic to rise further.
Requires 99.5% Branded attunement to reach Apex.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.s: The remnant sleeps beneath a higher threshold.
message.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.u: This remnant has already reached Apex.
The remnant rejects the rite. A proper catalyst is missing.
The remnant refuses to ascend further without the Oathbound Relic.
The remnant refuses Apex. Your Branded attunement is still lacking.
This remnant cannot advance further in its current state.
Dormant remnants require an Amethyst Shard to become Latent.
Latent remnants require an Oblivion Stone to awaken.
Awakened remnants require a Soul Gem to ascend.
Ascended remnants require Void Ashes to become Transcendent.
Transcendent remnants require a Nether Star to reach Apex.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.f: It beats harder each time something stronger than you fails to put you down.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.s: A remnant of weight, endurance, and crushing release.
Dormant: Grants armor and a little knockback resistance, but slightly slows the wearer.
Latent: Its shell hardens further, and lesser environmental harm is more easily ignored.
Awakened: Heavy non-magic hits begin building Impact.
Ascended: Impact grants stronger bonus damage, and the Heart's defenses deepen.
Transcendent: Impact-fueled strikes unleash a stronger shockwave and carry greater force.
Apex: The Heart turns punishment into overwhelming counterforce.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.d: Impact is built by surviving strong non-magic blows while Branded.
Impact empowers your next melee strike, then bursts outward into a crushing shockwave.
At high stacks, the Heart weighs on the body more heavily.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.flavo: A smoldering seed that believes pain and fire are simply another kind of fuel.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.summa: A remnant of flame, attrition, and rising momentum.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.stage: Dormant: Grants fire resistance, burns melee attackers, and shortens harmful effects.
Latent: Fire answers more quickly to the seed, and its protection grows steadier.
Awakened: Taking and dealing damage begin building Heat.
Ascended: Heat grants stronger bonus damage and swifter movement.
Transcendent: High Heat scorches nearby foes and keeps the bearer in relentless motion.
Apex: The Seed becomes a furnace that turns battle into acceleration.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.detai: Heat rises while fighting and slowly cools over time.
At moderate Heat, you gain speed. At high Heat, enemies nearby begin to burn.
Each stage improves how fiercely Heat rewards aggression.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.flavo: The sea remembers pressure, silence, and the strength to drag everything downward.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.summa: A remnant of drowning pressure, pursuit, and control beneath the waterline.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.stage: Dormant: Grants water breathing, underwater vision, and swifter movement in water.
Latent: Further softens blows from sea creatures and deepens underwater comfort.
Awakened: While underwater and Branded, nearby foes are slowed, weakened, and dragged downward.
Ascended: Its underwater pressure field grows broader and more oppressive.
Transcendent: Water becomes a battlefield the bearer controls almost entirely.
Apex: The Pearl turns the depths into a place of judgment and suffocation.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.detai: The Tide Pearl is strongest when the bearer chooses to fight underwater.
Its strength comes with a cost: fire becomes more dangerous to the wearer.
Higher stages intensify control over movement and positioning in water.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.skybrand_feather: It remembers the moment between falling and deciding not to.
A remnant of falling grace, evasive movement, and violent landings.
Dormant: Negates fall damage and may deflect incoming projectiles.
Latent: The Feather bends motion more reliably and favors the light-footed.
Awakened: While airborne and Branded, the wearer gains slow falling and stores falling force.
Ascended: Hard landings release a stronger gust that knocks back and slows enemies.
Transcendent: Airborne control sharpens and the landing burst grows more punishing.
Apex: The Feather makes the sky itself a weapon.
Stored fall force is released when you land after a meaningful drop.
The gust scatters nearby enemies and punishes those beneath your descent.
Wither and void damage remain more dangerous to the wearer.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.flav: It bends space the way fear bends reason.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.summ: A remnant of distortion, escape, and impossible retaliation.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.stag: Dormant: Greatly resists magic and ignores ender pearl self-damage.
Latent: The Lens hardens further against arcane harm, but remains unstable in water.
Awakened: Some incoming attacks trigger a Reactive Blink that negates the hit.
Ascended: A successful blink empowers your next strike more severely.
Transcendent: The Lens bends space more often and more decisively in combat.
Apex: Reality fails to keep hold of the bearer for long.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.deta: Reactive Blink teleports you away from the attacker and cancels that hit.
After a successful blink, your next strike becomes greatly empowered.
Water remains one of the few places where the Lens becomes dangerously unstable.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.flavo: It grows wakeful where light, certainty, and mercy begin to fail.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.summa: A remnant of darkness, decay, and surviving what should have been fatal.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.stage: Dormant: Grants airless survival, strips harmful effects, and inflicts Wither on your strikes.
Latent: Its refusal of death grows steadier, and darkness begins to favor the bearer.
Awakened: In low light and while Branded, nearby enemies suffer Hollow Dominion.
Ascended: Hollow Dominion spreads more reliably and your darkened strikes hit harder.
Transcendent: The Pearl becomes a stronger judge of those who enter its darkness.
Apex: It crowns the bearer with the authority of a living void.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.detai: Hollow Dominion is the awakened aura of Wither, Weakness, and Glowing inflicted in darkness.
The Void Pearl may also deny lethal damage, leaving the bearer barely alive.
Its power is strongest where local light is weak enough for the void to answer.
item.oathboundrelics.titans_remnant.name: %s %s
%s: %s
tooltip.oathboundrelics.remnant.next_upg: Next Upgrade: Mirrorsteel Idol and Branded by the Oath
Next Upgrade: Soul Gem and 99.5% Oath
This remnant has reached its final state.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.d: Dormant: Grants armor and a little knockback resistance.
The Heart slows the wearer, but shrugs off lesser environmental harm.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.l: Latent: The shell hardens further and the burden deepens.
The Heart begins preparing itself to store Impact.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.a: Awakened: Heavy non-magic hits begin building Impact.
Impact empowers your next melee strike.
Ascended: Impact grants stronger bonus damage.
The Heart's defenses deepen under the Oath.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.t: Transcendent: Impact bursts outward in a stronger crushing wave.
Its force grows more punishing with every stored stack.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.colossus_heart.a: Apex: The Heart turns punishment into overwhelming counterforce.
Few can endure enough burden to hear it beat at full strength.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.dorma: Dormant: Grants fire resistance and burns melee attackers.
Harmful effects fade faster while worn.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.laten: Latent: The Seed steadies itself in flame.
Its cinders answer more quickly to violence.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.awake: Awakened: Taking and dealing damage build Heat.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.ascen: Ascended: Heat grants stronger damage and movement speed.
The Seed rewards those who stay in the fire.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.ember_seed.trans: Transcendent: High Heat scorches nearby enemies.
The furnace grows more eager in battle.
Apex: The Seed turns combat into a rising blaze of speed and ruin.
Its heat no longer feels borrowed. It feels alive.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.dorma: Dormant: Grants water breathing, underwater vision, and swifter movement in water.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.laten: Latent: The sea's pressure settles around the bearer.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.awake: Awakened: Underwater foes are slowed, weakened, and dragged downward.
Fire becomes more dangerous to the bearer.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.ascen: Ascended: Its pressure field grows broader and harsher.
The Pearl begins to control the flow of nearby battle.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.tide_pearl.trans: Transcendent: Water becomes the bearer's chosen domain.
Enemies struggle to move, rise, or resist.
Apex: The depths answer with suffocating judgment.
Few survive long in water ruled by the Pearl.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.skybrand_feather: Dormant: Negates fall damage and may deflect projectiles.
Wither and void remain more dangerous to the wearer.
Latent: The Feather bends motion more reliably.
It begins to favor the light-footed and airborne.
Awakened: Airborne movement gains slow-falling control.
Hard landings store and release force.
Ascended: Landing gusts become stronger and slow nearby enemies.
The sky starts fighting beside you.
Transcendent: Airborne control sharpens and the landing burst grows crueler.
A fall becomes a threat, not a mistake.
Apex: The Feather makes descent itself into a weapon.
The sky does not always let go gently.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.dorm: Dormant: Greatly resists magic and ignores ender pearl self-damage.
Water makes the wearer dangerously unstable.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.late: Latent: Arcane harm bends further away from the bearer.
The Lens grows sharper and stranger under pressure.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.awak: Awakened: Some attacks trigger a Reactive Blink that negates the hit.
A successful blink empowers your next strike.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.asce: Ascended: Reactive Blink becomes a crueler answer to aggression.
Space begins to fail around the bearer more reliably.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.tran: Transcendent: Empowered retaliation grows even more severe.
Few blows land cleanly when the Lens is awake.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.nebula_lens.apex: Apex: Reality loses its grip on the bearer.
The next strike after escape becomes catastrophic.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.dorma: Dormant: Grants airless survival and strips harmful effects.
Your attacks inflict withering decay and death may fail to claim you.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.laten: Latent: Darkness begins to favor the bearer more openly.
Its refusal of death grows steadier.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.awake: Awakened: In darkness, nearby enemies suffer Hollow Dominion.
The Pearl is strongest where light fails.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.ascen: Ascended: Hollow Dominion spreads more reliably and your darkened strikes hit harder.
The void grows more attentive to your presence.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.void_pearl.trans: Transcendent: The Pearl becomes a harsher judge in darkness.
Nearby enemies weaken and wither faster.
Apex: It crowns the bearer with the authority of a living void.
Few lights remain kind in its presence.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.fla: A hollow lantern that remembers every vow paid in flesh.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.hol: Hold Shift to peer into the lantern.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.rel: Release Shift to avert your gaze.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.lin: Right-click to harvest a fragment of your soul.
Each offering removes %s of your max vitality and creates 1 Soul Gem.
The lantern refuses those who would fall below %s.
message.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.req: The lantern remains dark to any soul not bound by oath.
message.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.too: There is too little of you left for the lantern to take.
message.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.har: The lantern devours a sliver of your soul and leaves behind a Soul Gem.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.lin: While held or worn on the belt, it casts a ghostly light.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_gem.flavor: A pulse of stolen life trapped in crystal.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_gem.line_1: Right-click to reclaim 1 lost max HP.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_gem.line_2: Only works if the Soul Lantern has taken something from you first.
message.oathboundrelics.soul_gem.no_debt: The gem finds nothing of yours to return.
message.oathboundrelics.soul_gem.restore: The Soul Gem returns a sliver of your stolen vitality.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.soul_lantern.pla: Can be placed as a lantern.
May be set down as a grim ornament, or worn at the belt.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.alread: The altar is already devouring an oath.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.need_r: You must bear the Oathbound Relic to begin the rite.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.night_: The rite may only begin at night, or within the End.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.need_m: The altar demands 1 Oblivion Stone, 4 Echo Shards, 4 Crying Obsidian, and 16 Soul Soil.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.starte: The Rite of Severance begins. Do not flee.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.failed: The rite collapses. The altar is left hungry.
The rite snaps apart as your presence slips away.
The relic is no longer bound. The rite fails.
You strayed too far from the altar. The oath tightens once more.
message.oathboundrelics.severance.succes: The ring splits, blackens, and crumbles to ash. The oath is severed.
advancement.oathboundrelics.severed_oath: Destroy the Oathbound Relic and free yourself from the brand.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.fractured_relic_: What was torn away still lingers in quiet defense.
Its warmth is gone, but not its memory.
Passive: The remains of a broken oath harden the bearer against the world.
Only ash remains where tyranny once circled the hand.
The scar it left behind has learned to shield instead of bind.
tooltip.oathboundrelics.brandkeepers_mer: Even the gentle things know when the Oath has already taken enough.
Passive: Neutral creatures no longer turn hostile from Provocation.
The Mercy quiets the curse that turns harmless life against you.
Dormant until the bearer reaches 99.5% Branded attunement.
